note: Should-trigger / should-not-trigger queries for tuning activation. Triggers: the sigil '@@FL[:N][:M[:Z]]' (preferred) or the prose marker 'farnsworth loop:N[:M[:Z]]', case-insensitive with optional spaces. N = attempts/round (optional; inferable from a prose model spec or the Top Mixed preset), M = passes (1 single, 2 two), Z = grand loops (Z>1 not yet implemented, inert). 'mode' is the expected mode; n/assignment/z/needsGate/conflict/error/preset are expected fl-parse.mjs outputs where relevant. Non-triggers are genuine non-tournaments or other tournament phrasings that belong to the separate best-of-n skill, not this explicitly-named one.

queries.query: write a python program for hangman game, farnsworth loop:4
build a CSV parser farnsworth loop:3
implement a token bucket rate limiter :farnsworth loop:6:2
draft a distributor pitch email, Farnsworth Loop:4:2
two-round attempt on this regex farnsworth loop:5:2
what is iterative refinement in LLM sampling?
explain how genetic algorithms do selection and mutation
review this code and give me two passes of feedback
i made two attempts at this already, which is better?
summarise this document in two passes, skim then detail
set up a two-stage build pipeline in CI
compare Opus and Sonnet on a coding task
give me one strong solution, no tournament
what is the Farnsworth lens in photography?
build a parser with 2 opus, 2 glm 5.2, 1 codex high @@FL
do abc, 1 opus and 1 sonnet and 1 codex farnsworth loop:3
improve X @@FL:4 with 2 opus, 2 glm, 1 codex
do x with 2 opus and 1 sonnet @@FL:3

queries.comment: digit-noun guard: '3 bugs' is task text, n stays 5
'2 modules' task text ignored; '2 opus' is the spec

queries.query: do x with 2 opus and 1 gpt4 @@FL
queries.comment: unknown token rejected loudly, never dropped
no marker; ordinary digit-noun task must NOT trigger

queries.query: compare 2 opus and 1 sonnet runs side by side
queries.comment: a prose spec alone (no marker) does not trigger

queries.query: run the top mixed playlist on shuffle
queries.comment: 'top mixed' without a marker is not a tournament
